Opening October 2026 — Martens Pet Cremation Services is preparing to serve families across Central Alberta. For questions or future arrangements, please contact us.

Contact Martens Pet Cremation Services

Opening October 2026, Matt and Joanne are preparing to provide respectful, professional, and personalized care for families across Central Alberta. Please reach out with any questions, future arrangement inquiries, or quote requests.
